reason: Go 1.25 is the previous stable release and is required by golang.org/x/net v0.57.0.

release_note.text: openai-go v3.45.0 requires Go 1.25 or newer. This release upgrades `golang.org/x/net` to v0.57.0 to address security findings and aligns the SDK with supported Go toolchains. v3.44.0 is the final release that builds with Go 1.22–1.24; older SDK releases do not receive guaranteed security backports. No exported SDK API or `/v3` import path changes are included.
